name: growi-mcp-server
description: MCP server that connects AI models to GROWI wiki content. Enables searching, reading, and creating pages in your GROWI knowledge base.

settings.name: Default App Name
settings.description: The default GROWI app name to use

settings.name: App Name
settings.description: Name identifier for the GROWI app

settings.name: API Token
settings.description: API token for authenticating with GROWI

settings.name: Base URL
settings.description: Base URL of the GROWI instance (e.g. https://your-growi.example.com)
